assertions.title: Missing historical rounds show a complete creation plan

steps.action: Run importer dry-run for legacy round 10815 before any apply
steps.expected: One create decision with completed Marathon Match/Data Science challenge shape and Registration/Submission/Review phase plan
steps.observed: decision=create, reason=no-matching-v6-challenge-found, createPathChallengeShape={'type': 'Marathon Match', 'track': 'Data Science', 'status': 'COMPLETED', 'phaseNames': ['Registration', 'Submission', 'Review'], 'timelineTemplateId': '6969125a-a12f-4b89-8de6-e66b0056f36b'}, createPathPhasePlan keys=['Registration', 'Submission', 'Review']

assertions.title: Missing historical round creates one completed marathon challenge

steps.action: Confirm no challenge exists for legacyId 10815 before apply
Run importer apply for legacy round 10815

steps.expected: Exactly one completed Marathon Match/Data Science challenge with legacyId 10815
steps.observed: 1 match; legacyId=10815, type=Marathon Match, track=Data Science, status=COMPLETED

assertions.title: Created historical MM binds to a canonical marathon-match timeline mapping

steps.expected: Active Marathon Match template with non-empty MM phase shape
steps.observed: name=Marathon Match, isActive=True, templatePhaseCount=3; created challenge phases=['Registration', 'Submission', 'Review']

assertions.title: Rerun planning classifies already-imported work as no-op

steps.action: Rerun importer dry-run for legacy round 10815 after the apply run
steps.expected: Already-imported work is classified as no-op with no duplicate creates across the full contract surface
steps.observed: decision=reuse/backfill-only, matchedChallengeId=5fa76bd9-da55-422d-8d4c-4f0155dc62c5, rerunClassification=partial-backfill, phases.toCreate=0, resources.toCreate=836, submissions.toCreate=1445, finalScores.toCreate=267, provisionalScores.toCreate=1445

evidence.network: Rerun dry-run only; no additional write call was made.

assertions.issues: Post-apply rerun proved challenge/phase reuse only: the dry-run switched to reuse/backfill-only for 5fa76bd9-da55-422d-8d4c-4f0155dc62c5 and reported phases existing=3/toCreate=0, but rerunClassification remained partial-backfill because resources/submissions/finalScores/provisionalScores still showed pending creates (836/1445/267/1445). This milestone does not backfill those later-surface entities, so a true no-op rerun for the full contract cannot be proven from this run.

blockers.description: Post-apply rerun proved challenge/phase reuse only: the dry-run switched to reuse/backfill-only for 5fa76bd9-da55-422d-8d4c-4f0155dc62c5 and reported phases existing=3/toCreate=0, but rerunClassification remained partial-backfill because resources/submissions/finalScores/provisionalScores still showed pending creates (836/1445/267/1445). This milestone does not backfill those later-surface entities, so a true no-op rerun for the full contract cannot be proven from this run.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Completed the create-path apply and reran dry-run immediately to see whether the importer would classify the round as a full no-op.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked. VAL-PLAN-014 is blocked because rerun proved challenge/phase reuse but still planned later-milestone resources, submissions, and scores.
